page_content:
Prerequisite: PUAF752.

Credit Only Granted for. PUAF698C, PUAF753 or PLCY753.

Formerly: PUAF698C and PUAF753.

PLCY770 Seminar in Housing and Community Development Strategies (3 Credits)

Detailed examination of community and social policy issues relating to the construction and management of affordable housing.

Restriction: Must be in a major in PLCY-School of Public Policy.

Credit Only Granted for. PLCY770 or PUAF770.
